Title: Verify successful sign-up
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the sign-up page
2. Enter a valid email address
3. Enter a valid password
4. Enter a valid name
5. Click the "Sign Up" button
Expected Result: The user is successfully registered, and they are redirected to the login page

Title: Verify unsuccessful sign-up due to invalid email
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the sign-up page
2. Enter an invalid email address
3. Enter a valid password
4. Enter a valid name
5. Click the "Sign Up" button
Expected Result: An error message is displayed, and the user is not registered

Title: Verify unsuccessful sign-up due to invalid password
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the sign-up page
2. Enter a valid email address
3. Enter an invalid password
4. Enter a valid name
5. Click the "Sign Up" button
Expected Result: An error message is displayed, and the user is not registered

Title: Verify unsuccessful sign-up due to invalid name
Test Data: Valid email, valid password, invalid name
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the sign-up page
2. Enter a valid email address
3. Enter a valid password
4. Enter an invalid name
5. Click the "Sign Up" button
Expected Result: An error message is displayed, and the user is not registered

2. Enter a valid email address
3. Enter a valid password
4. Click the "Login" button
Expected Result: The user is successfully logged in and redirected to the main page

Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page
2. Enter an invalid email address
3. Enter a valid password
4. Click the "Login" button
Expected Result: An error message is displayed, and the user is not logged in

Title: Verify unsuccessful login due to invalid password
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page
2. Enter a valid email address
3. Enter an invalid password
4. Click the "Login" button
Expected Result: An error message is displayed, and the user is not logged in

Title: Verify successful filtering of announcements
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the announcements page
2. Apply valid filters
Expected Result: The displayed announcements match the applied filters

Title: Verify unsuccessful filtering of announcements due to invalid filters
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the announcements page
2. Apply invalid filters
Expected Result: An error message is displayed, and the announcements are not filtered

2. Click the "Accept" button

Title: Verify unsuccessful acceptance of an announcement due to invalid announcement
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the announcement page
2. Click the "Accept" button
Expected Result: An error message is displayed, and the announcement is not accepted

Expected Result: The account information is successfully updated
